run_summary.summary: One deal update and three new deal cards to carry forward from the last run. JLab's accounting team reached out on Apr 27 to onboard Liz to their Tipalti payment portal — she registered and added payment details the same day (confirmed by 'Contact or payment details have been changed' notification). Invoice submission address is apinvoice@jlab.com. This is meaningful context for wherever the JLab deal sits right now — if it's at Invoiced, payment could be coming soon. Also preserving three new deal creates from the previous run that may not have been applied yet: Wise Block (launch window closes Apr 30 — urgent!), Shabebe, and Black Diamond Coatings.

suggestions.message: Today (Apr 28) is the last real window — Iris at Make Wonder INC has followed up 5 times since Apr 23 and their Botanical Series launch deadline is Apr 25–30. Cash comp + free building block set + Key Partner status for 1 YouTube/Instagram video. If there's any interest at all, a rate quote needs to go out today.

Liz completed JLab's Tipalti payment portal setup on Apr 27 — payment details are in. If an invoice hasn't gone out yet, now is a good time. Submit invoices to apinvoice@jlab.com (pdf/jpg/png only). Portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab/Account/Login
Liz pitched them Apr 27 for the backyard firepit patio collab featuring Rock Glue — card is on the board. Follow-up around Apr 30 if no response.
Same firepit concept pitched to Lauren Jankauskas Apr 27 — card is on the board. Follow-up around Apr 30 if no response.

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: JLab accounting team (ap@jlabaudio.com) sent Tipalti payment portal invitation. Liz completed registration same day — account created successfully and payment/banking details added (confirmed by payment change notification). Invoice submission: apinvoice@jlab.com (pdf, jpg, or png only). Portal login: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab/Account/Login
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: JLab onboarded Liz to Tipalti payment portal — account created and payment details confirmed

deals.next_action: Reply to Iris with rate quote — launch window closes Apr 30
deals.notes:
[Apr 28]: Iris followed up a 5th time asking for Liz's quotation for the Wise Block Botanical Series. Launch window closes Apr 30.
[Apr 23]: Original outreach from Iris at Make Wonder INC (official Wise Block partner agency under Alpha Group). Offering cash compensation (competitive collaboration fee) + 1 free building block set + Key Partner status for 1 YouTube/Instagram Video. Botanical Series = Eastern-themed building block sets (Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony). Sample delivery: 3–5 days after confirmation. Launch deadline: before April 25–30.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Lauren if no response by Apr 30
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch to Lauren at Shabebe proposing a backyard firepit patio makeover collab. Concept: raised patio with large pavers + pea gravel, showcasing Shabebe's Rock Glue and hardscape products for a DIY family-friendly outdoor space. Liz attached media kit and CC'd Kenny.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Lauren if no response by Apr 30
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch to Lauren Jankauskas at Black Diamond Coatings proposing a backyard firepit patio makeover collab. Same DIY patio project concept as Shabebe pitch, featuring their Mulch Glue and hardscape products. Liz attached media kit and CC'd Kenny.
